_about: Insights & UI category (Insight, GenericWidget, WidgetQuery, PageTemplate, PageTemplateEntities, LayoutTemplate, TagMetadata, Activities, Notification, NotificationV2, Profile, Person, Project, Results). Many endpoints exist to power the CluedIn UI surfaces (dashboards, widgets, notifications). The deduplication `Project` and `Results` endpoints provide the project workflow for the deduplication UI.

GET /api/v1/activities.description: Returns the organisation's activity feed (recent platform activity). Paged via standard query parameters.

GET /api/v2/activities.description: Version 2 of the activity feed endpoint with refined response shape.

DELETE /api/v1/notification.description: Deletes one or more notifications for the calling user.

PUT /api/v1/notification/markall.description: Marks every notification for the calling user as read.

GET /api/v1/providernotification/all.description: Returns provider-related notifications (provider failures, configuration changes) for the organisation.

PUT /api/v1/provider/count.description: Resets the provider notification counter for the caller.

GET /api/v1/profile.description: Returns the calling user's profile (display name, picture, settings).

GET /api/person/byentitycode/{personrefe.description: Returns the Person entity matching the supplied reference code (typically a `CluedIn(userId)` style code).

GET /api/tag/metadata/{tagName}.description: Returns metadata for the supplied tag (description, owner, folder, etc.).

POST /api/tag/metadata/{tagName}/update.description: Updates metadata for the supplied tag.

POST /api/tag/metadata/folder/rename.description: Renames a tag folder. All tags inside the folder remain in place but the folder name changes.

GET /api/deduplication/projects.description: Returns paged deduplication projects with optional filters.

POST /api/deduplication/projects.description: Creates a deduplication project from the supplied model. Returns 400 with validation details when the filter rules are invalid. Requires the Management.DeduplicationManagement RACI claim.

GET /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Returns a deduplication project by id. Returns 404 if it cannot be found.

PUT /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Updates a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is in a state that does not allow updates, 404 when it cannot be found.

DELETE /api/deduplication/projects/{proj.description: Deletes a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is in a state that does not allow deletion.

GET /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Returns the entities the project has merged.

POST /api/deduplication/projects/{projec.description: Undoes a previously committed merge from this project.
Undoes a merge with extra options controlling how downstream effects are reverted.
Triggers result generation for the deduplication project (running rules to find candidate groups).

GET /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Returns paged candidate-duplicate groups produced by the project.
Returns a single candidate-duplicate group and its members.

POST /api/deduplication/projects/{projec.description: Updates a group's review state (for example marking members for inclusion/exclusion).

DELETE /api/deduplication/projects/{proj.description: Removes an entity from a deduplication result group.

POST /api/deduplication/projects/{projec.description: Approves a single result group for merging.
Runs the auto-selection algorithm on a single group to pick the survivor and source records.
Clears any manual user decisions on the supplied group, reverting to default behavior.

GET /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Returns a preview of what the merged record would look like for a group.

POST /api/deduplication/projects/{projec.description: Removes a previously approved status from a group.
Approves a set of selected groups.
Approves every group in the project.
Removes approval from a set of selected groups.
Removes approval from every group in the project.
Rejects a set of selected groups.
Merges the supplied set of groups.
Commits the merges for every approved group in the project.
Cancels an in-progress results generation.
Cancels an in-progress merge operation.
Aborts the results-generation pipeline for the project.
Aborts an in-progress undo operation.
Undoes merges performed by the project.

GET /api/deduplication/projects/{project.description: Returns the status of an in-progress undo.
Returns the current status of the project's results pipeline (generating, committing, idle, etc.).
Returns the status of the current commit (merge) step.
Returns the per-group status (approved, rejected, merged, etc.) for project review.
Returns just the counts of groups in each status (lightweight version of `groupstatuses`).
Returns a histogram of the project's result groups (typically group size distribution).
